label: CHARACTER DISPLAY
title: Qi: Before the Convenience Store
speaker: Qi
body: She wakes in the ruins before entering the corner convenience store. The white blade, the signal tower, and dusk form the first memory of this stop.
mainAlt: Placeholder scene of Qi waking in the ruins at dusk

waking.title: Waking
waking.expressionAlt: Placeholder portrait of Qi looking uncertain
waking.response: I remember that I am supposed to wake once every ten years. This time the city is quieter than memory, as if someone removed the voices and the crowd but left the power, the signal tower, and this white blade.

blade.title: White Edge
blade.expressionAlt: Placeholder portrait of Qi looking focused
blade.response: Maybe it began as something I made by hand before hibernation. A few centuries of real time make it look like a relic, but its real weight comes from the story I forgot.

tower.title: Signal Tower
tower.expressionAlt: Placeholder portrait of Qi looking calm
tower.response: At dusk, the signal tower still blinks red in a steady rhythm. If flights still need to avoid it, the city is not completely dead. The corner convenience store may answer whether this stop is safe enough to stay.

work101.title: Work 101
work101.response: 101 would know why this blade matters. She always turns what I forget into a story, as if she is the one who has lived for me many times.

shop.title: The Corner
shop.expressionAlt: Placeholder portrait of Qi preparing to move
shop.response: The convenience store is still lit. It is not a welcome or an order, only the gentle reminder of this age: if you choose to remain, the world will still prepare a bench for you.
